reasoning: Strong risk-off rotation: XLK -1.07% and XLF -1.73% (both >0.5% down) while XLE +1.29% (defensive outperformance). The two largest SPY constituents (tech ~30%, financials ~15%) are leading lower. XLF weakness signals financial/credit stress, which argues against near-term SPY recovery. Tech underperforming SPY itself (-1.07% vs -0.64%) indicates sector-level selling pressure. Sector breadth is clear: growth/cyclicals out, defensives/commodities in. High-confidence bearish bias.
key_observations: XLK -1.07%: Tech selling is a significant SPY headwind (tech is largest weighting); leadership deteriorating
XLF -1.73%: Financials in stress; largest decline among core sectors signals credit/yield concerns
XLE +1.29%: Energy outperforming while growth sectors sell = classic defensive rotation into commodity/inflation hedges
Overall rotation: Risk-off with high conviction — no bullish offset from any major sector
